regional_cost_note: Cabinet makers in Whanganui typically charge $1,600–$3,200/m run for custom kitchen cabinetry, $900–$2,700/m for custom wardrobes, and higher rates for commercial joinery. Whanganui rates are typically 10–15% below the national average. Lead times for custom joinery are typically 8–14 weeks — factor this into your project schedule.
